---
title: "Materials"
sidebar: true
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Overview

*Placeholder – course materials overview goes here.*

This section contains all learning materials, organized by topic. Use the sidebar to navigate.

---

## Pre-requisites

Before the first session, complete the setup steps in order:

1. **[Software Setup](prerequisites/software.qmd)** — Install Stata, R, Python, Positron, Quarto, Git, and UV
2. **[GitHub](prerequisites/github.qmd)** — Create a GitHub account, join the WB org, request Copilot access
3. **[Positron Extensions](prerequisites/extensions.qmd)** — Install and configure the Stata MCP extension
4. **[Positron Assistant](prerequisites/assistant.qmd)** — Connect GitHub to Positron and enable the AI assistant
5. **[Licenses & Access](prerequisites/licenses.qmd)** — Understand Copilot quotas, WB overuse budget, and software licences
6. **[Common Problems](prerequisites/common-problems.qmd)** — UV install issues, access denied errors, Positron update

---

## Course Content

*Placeholder – additional course topics and modules will be listed here.*
